input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.4.7.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.4.7.1
            TITLE: all or portions of the tractive system, charger and other components may be sealed  in.2.6

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.4.7.1: All or portions of the Tractive System, Charger and other components may be sealed  IN.2.6
IN.4.7.1 All or portions of the Tractive System, Charger and other components may be sealed  IN.2.6

final_answer: All or portions of the Tractive System, Charger and other components may be sealed IN.2.6
